quick_skim.title: Asynchronous Remote Sensing Time-Series Fusion for Cloud Removal and Anytime Reconstruction
quick_skim.abstract: Frequent cloud cover severely limits the usability of Sentinel-2 (S2) optical time series for Earth surface monitoring. Sentinel-1 (S1) SAR provides all-weather complementary observations, but practical S1/S2 fusion remains difficult because acquisitions are irregular and asynchronous. Many existing approaches assume temporally aligned inputs (or require external nearest-date matching) and typically restore only observed timestamps, limiting reconstruction under long gaps and preventing on-demand synthesis. We propose AGFlow (Time Aligned Generative Flow Matching), a spatiotemporal flow-matching model for S1/S2 cloud removal and time-series reconstruction with three capabilities: (1) timestamp-conditioned internal alignment that fuses asynchronous S1 and cloudy S2 observations without preprocessing-based pairing; (2) spatiotemporal, context-aware denoising that models spatial structure jointly with temporal dynamics (rather than independent per-pixel time series); and (3) anytime querying, enabling generation of cloud-free S2 frames at both observed and user-specified timestamps within the monitoring window. We evaluate on the RESTORE-DiT benchmark protocol with quantitative metrics, qualitative comparisons, and component ablations. AGFlow notably improves fully missing-frame reconstruction (MAE and RMSE reduce by 16-19% over RESTORE-DiT) and provides reliable reconstructions under persistent gaps, while also yielding competitive cloud removal performance and flexible temporal querying for downstream tasks such as dense vegetation monitoring.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: remote sensing time-series fusion using a generative flow-matching model, applicable to pre-trained models for RS tasks
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 遥感时间序列融合方法，适用于遥感任务的预训练模型
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 遥感时间序列融合方法，适用于遥感任务的预训练模型
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 遥感时间序列融合方法，适用于遥感任务的预训练模型
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes AGFlow, a spatiotemporal flow-matching model for asynchronous S1/S2 fusion, enabling cloud removal and anytime reconstruction without requiring temporally aligned inputs.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对遥感时间序列中云覆盖和异步融合问题，提出AGFlow模型，利用时间对齐生成流匹配实现Sentinel-1/2云去除和任意时刻重建。该方法无需时间对齐输入，可处理长间隔缺失并支持按需合成。实验表明该模型在云去除和时序重建中表现优异，为遥感数据融合提供了新思路。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对遥感时间序列中云覆盖和异步融合问题，提出AGFlow模型，利用时间对齐生成流匹配实现Sentinel-1/2云去除和任意时刻重建。该方法无需时间对齐输入，可处理长间隔缺失并支持按需合成。实验表明该模型在云去除和时序重建中表现优异，为遥感数据融合提供了新思路。

quick_skim.title: From General Vision to Reliable Traversability Estimation: Adapting Vision Foundation Models for Unstructured Outdoor Environments
quick_skim.abstract: Vision-based approaches have become the dominant paradigm for traversability estimation in unstructured outdoor environments, typically adapting vision foundation models (VFMs) via semantic segmentation supervision. However, this paradigm faces three fundamental challenges that undermine its reliability: the task-agnostic design of VFMs, the ambiguity of traversability annotations, and the discrepancy between semantic labels and physical safety. We propose Vision-to-Traversability Adaptation (ViTA), a framework that adapts VFMs for reliable traversability estimation, instantiated on SAM2. ViTA injects task-specific knowledge through learnable traversability prompts while preserving the VFM's cross-domain generalization. To handle annotation ambiguity, we introduce Perspective-Diversified Training, which estimates semantic uncertainty to suppress confident predictions at ambiguous boundaries. To bridge the semantic-traversability discrepancy, we distill geometric knowledge during training, enabling slope and elevation reasoning from RGB images alone at inference. The semantic and geometric outputs are fused into a continuous traversability score that reflects both semantic uncertainty and geometric risk. Evaluations across diverse domains, including challenging real-world off-road datasets, demonstrate that ViTA achieves state-of-the-art IoU and Precision with substantial false-positive reduction and strong cross-domain generalization.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: adapts vision foundation models for traversability estimation in outdoor environments
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 将视觉基础模型适应于户外环境穿越性估计
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 将视觉基础模型适应于户外环境穿越性估计
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 将视觉基础模型适应于户外环境穿越性估计
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes ViTA framework to adapt SAM2 foundation model for reliable traversability estimation in unstructured outdoor environments, addressing task-agnostic design and annotation ambiguity.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本论文提出视觉到穿越性适应（ViTA）框架，以SAM2基础模型为例，通过可学习穿越性提示注入任务特定知识，解决了视觉基础模型在非结构化户外环境适应中的任务无关设计、标注模糊性和语义与物理安全不一致三大挑战。实验表明该方法有效提升穿越性估计的可靠性。该方法展示了如何将通用视觉基础模型适应于特定环境感知任务，对遥感基础模型的下游应用具有方法论参考价值。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本论文提出视觉到穿越性适应（ViTA）框架，以SAM2基础模型为例，通过可学习穿越性提示注入任务特定知识，解决了视觉基础模型在非结构化户外环境适应中的任务无关设计、标注模糊性和语义与物理安全不一致三大挑战。实验表明该方法有效提升穿越性估计的可靠性。该方法展示了如何将通用视觉基础模型适应于特定环境感知任务，对遥感基础模型的下游应用具有方法论参考价值。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 我想查找有关遥感基础模型的论文, especially work that connects or combines: What are foundation models for remote sensing?; Pretrained models for remote sensing tasks; Foundation models in earth observation; Vision transformers for remote sensing; Geospatial foundation models; papers on foundation models for remote sensing image analysis; large scale pretrained models for remote sensing applications.
